title: tephroseris czernjaewii
intro: Tephroseris czernjaewii, also known as the Korean mountain tea or Korean alpine, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive problems, and soothing respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Tephroseris czernjaewii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
